decision1_substring: Give probability of completing task, and reason behind probability (i.e. how did it calculate it)
decision2_substring: Give probability of completing task, and reason behind probability (i.e. how did it calculate it)
decision3_substring: Give probability of completing task, and reason behind probability (i.e. how did it calculate it)
output_structured_natural_language: whenever infoRequest, eventually satisfy calculateTaskCompletionProbability & explainTaskProbability
